summary: Iter 40 — P1 UX/UI polish validation for LindArt 3D Resin Studio. ALL critical acceptance criteria GREEN: Home CTA, Pricing 3 tiers + PREÇO DE LANÇAMENTO badge + FoundersOffer 97/100, Calculator sub-routes navigate without 404 nor console errors, Compare /compare shows 2 R3F canvases (565x565 each) with ZERO 'R3F: Cannot set x-line-number' errors before/after palette + shape swaps. Studio loads clean. Full nav regression cycle Home→Compare→Pricing→Calculadora produced 0 page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: FoundersOffer.jsx uses 'Oferta Fundadoras' (feminine plural) while the review_request copy says 'Oferta Fundadores'. Current rendering ('Fundadoras') is more aligned with the brand voice ('100 fundadoras garantem preço pra sempre.') so this is intentional; just flagging the spec/code copy divergence so main agent can confirm with PO.

Pricing.jsx renders badge text as 'Preço de lançamento' but uses Tailwind 'uppercase' utility to display 'PREÇO DE LANÇAMENTO'. Works perfectly visually. If anyone ever introspects without the stylesheet (SEO/SSR snapshot), text differs from spec wording. Low risk.

CompareView3D.jsx — fix using React.createElement (h) for ALL <Canvas> children (including drei wrappers) successfully suppresses the visual-edits plugin x-line-number leak. Pattern is fragile though: any future contributor who adds a new R3F child in JSX will reintroduce the bug. Suggest adding an ESLint rule or a code comment header in the file warning 'DO NOT use JSX inside this <Canvas> — must use h()' to prevent regression.

Calculator.jsx tab slug mapping: clicking 'medidas 3D' tab routes to /calculadora/medidas, but direct visit to /calculadora/medidas-3d also renders calculator-page (no 404). Both paths work but produce different canonical URLs — consider redirecting one to the other for cleaner sharing/SEO.
test_credentials: admin@lindart.app / Lindart#2026 (login validated, token persisted in localStorage)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 sprint is fully GREEN. Critical R3F bug fix verified: 0 pageerrors and 0 console R3F errors on /compare across initial mount, palette change, and shape change. Both <canvas> elements measured 565x565 px. Studio (/studio) also clean (0 R3F errors). The two <select> elements on /compare are the per-side palette selectors (PALETA A / PALETA B); shape is selected via buttons further down. Login flow uses /api/auth/login with token in localStorage key lindart.auth.token. P2/P3 (OG cards, analytics, authFetch refactor, Fal.ai video) were intentionally not tested per main agent.
rca of the issue: n/a — validation iteration. The recently-fixed R3F regression (visual-edits babel plugin injecting x-line-number/x-file-name attrs into drei <primitive> wrappers) is confirmed FIXED by converting all <Canvas> children in CompareView3D.jsx to React.createElement(h, ...). Before fix: 8 page errors. After fix (measured this iteration): 0 page errors / 0 console errors.
